scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @rozoai/intent-common run lint && pnpm --filter @rozoai/intent-pay run lint && pnpm --filter examples/nextjs-app run lint
scripts.format: pnpm --filter @rozoai/intent-common run format && pnpm --filter @rozoai/intent-pay run format && pnpm --filter examples/nextjs-app run format
scripts.build: pnpm run build:common && pnpm run build:pay
scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:common & pnpm run dev:pay & pnpm run dev:example:16
scripts.release: pnpm run build && cd packages/pay-common && pnpm publish && cd ../../packages/connectkit && pnpm run release
scripts.clean:all: find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name 'dist' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name 'build' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name '.next' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && rm -f pnpm-lock.yaml
